---
title: "Configuring The System Settings"
---

This section has information on how to configure the system settings for the Hyland for Salesforce application using the Application Configurations tab.

To configure the system settings:

1.  Open a web browser and log on to the Salesforce environment with your credentials. The Home page is displayed.
2.  From the top-right of the Home page, click the App Launcher button.   ![App Launcher button](data:image/gif;base64,)   The App Launcher drop-down menu is displayed.
3.  In the App Launcher search box, enter Application Configuration. The search results are displayed.
4.  Click Application Configurations from the search results. The Application Configurations login page is displayed.
5.  Log on to the Hyland for Salesforce application if you aren't authenticated already. The Application Configurations page is displayed.
6.  Configure the following options:

| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Page Size | Enter a value ranging from 10 to 500. This determines the number of documents displayed on a single page. |
| Viewer URL | Enter the URL for the document viewer. The document viewer allows users to open and view one or more captured documents in a new browser tab.To obtain this URL, complete the instructions under Obtaining the Viewer URL. |
| Maximum file size | Enter a value ranging from 0 to 5000. This specifies the maximum size (in MB) of a supported file that can be captured. |

7.  Next to File types, select the file types that you want to capture. Only the file types that you select can be captured using Hyland for Salesforce.
1.  Under the Available list, select one or more file types and click >.  Tip: Click Ctrl to select mutiple file types.  The selected file types are displayed under Selected.
8.  Review the information and then from the top-right, click Save.
